description: Lightweight Directory Access Protocol — Active Directory enumeration, user/group/computer discovery, ACL analysis, and credential extraction.

tools.name: NetExec (nxc) — LDAP
tools.description: LDAP-based AD enumeration, credential attacks, and module execution via NetExec.

commands.title: Anonymous LDAP bind — check access
commands.description: Test if anonymous LDAP binding is allowed on the target.

commands.title: Authenticated LDAP bind
commands.description: Validate credentials against LDAP and get domain info.

commands.title: Pass-the-Hash LDAP bind
commands.description: Authenticate to LDAP using an NTLM hash.

commands.title: Enumerate users via LDAP
commands.description: List all domain user accounts via LDAP query.

commands.title: Enumerate groups via LDAP
commands.description: List all domain groups via LDAP query.

commands.title: AS-REP Roast via LDAP
commands.description: Find AS-REP roastable accounts and dump hashes via LDAP.

commands.title: Kerberoast via LDAP
commands.description: Find Kerberoastable accounts and request TGS tickets via LDAP.

commands.title: BloodHound collection via LDAP
commands.description: Collect BloodHound data (all collection methods) via LDAP.

commands.title: Get password policy
commands.description: Retrieve domain password policy via LDAP.

commands.title: Enumerate LAPS passwords
commands.description: Dump LAPS (Local Administrator Password Solution) passwords if readable.

commands.title: Enumerate gMSA passwords
commands.description: Dump Group Managed Service Account (gMSA) passwords.

commands.title: Enumerate AD CS templates
commands.description: Enumerate Active Directory Certificate Services templates.

commands.title: Get Machine Account Quota (MAQ)
commands.description: Check the machine account quota (ms-DS-MachineAccountQuota) for the domain.

commands.title: Search user descriptions for passwords
commands.description: Search user description fields for potential cleartext passwords.

commands.title: Check LDAP signing
commands.description: Check if LDAP signing and channel binding are enforced.

commands.title: Enumerate trusted-for-delegation accounts
commands.description: Find accounts trusted for unconstrained delegation.

commands.title: Enumerate admin count users
commands.description: Find all accounts with adminCount=1 set.

tools.name: ldapsearch
tools.description: Native LDAP client for crafting custom queries against Active Directory.

commands.title: Anonymous bind — dump naming contexts
commands.description: Query the root DSE anonymously to discover naming contexts (base DN).

commands.title: Anonymous bind — dump all objects
commands.description: Dump all LDAP objects anonymously (works if anonymous bind is allowed).

commands.title: Authenticated bind — dump all
commands.description: Authenticate and dump all LDAP objects.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain users
commands.command: ldapsearch -x -H ldap://{{IP}} -D '{{USERNAME}}@{{DOMAIN}}' -w '{{PASSWORD}}' -b '{{BASEDN}}' '(&(objectCategory=person)(objectClass=user))' sAMAccountName userPrincipalName memberOf description
commands.description: List all user accounts with key attributes.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain computers
commands.description: List all domain-joined computers with OS info.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain groups
commands.description: List all groups and their members.

commands.title: Enumerate Domain Admins
commands.description: List all members of the Domain Admins group.

commands.title: Enumerate Enterprise Admins
commands.description: List all members of the Enterprise Admins group.

commands.title: Find accounts with SPNs (Kerberoastable)
commands.description: Find user accounts with Service Principal Names set (Kerberoastable targets).

commands.title: Find AS-REP roastable accounts
commands.description: Find accounts with 'Do not require Kerberos preauthentication' flag set.

commands.title: Enumerate password policy
commands.command: ldapsearch -x -H ldap://{{IP}} -D '{{USERNAME}}@{{DOMAIN}}' -w '{{PASSWORD}}' -b '{{BASEDN}}' '(objectClass=domain)' minPwdLength maxPwdAge minPwdAge pwdHistoryLength lockoutThreshold lockoutDuration
commands.description: Retrieve the domain password and lockout policy.

commands.title: Enumerate domain trusts
commands.command: ldapsearch -x -H ldap://{{IP}} -D '{{USERNAME}}@{{DOMAIN}}' -w '{{PASSWORD}}' -b '{{BASEDN}}' '(objectClass=trustedDomain)' cn trustDirection trustType trustAttributes flatName
commands.description: Enumerate all domain trust relationships.

commands.title: Enumerate Group Policy Objects (GPOs)
commands.description: List all GPOs and their SYSVOL paths.

commands.title: Enumerate Organizational Units (OUs)
commands.description: List all OUs and linked GPOs.

commands.title: Enumerate LAPS passwords
commands.description: Dump LAPS managed local admin passwords (requires read permissions).

commands.title: Find disabled accounts
commands.description: Find all disabled user accounts.

commands.title: Find accounts with AdminCount=1
commands.description: Find protected admin accounts (AdminCount=1, protected by AdminSDHolder).

commands.title: Find unconstrained delegation computers
commands.description: Find computers trusted for unconstrained delegation.

commands.title: Find constrained delegation accounts
commands.description: Find accounts with constrained delegation configured.

commands.title: Find resource-based constrained delegation
commands.description: Find objects with resource-based constrained delegation (RBCD) configured.

commands.title: Enumerate certificate templates
commands.command: ldapsearch -x -H ldap://{{IP}} -D '{{USERNAME}}@{{DOMAIN}}' -w '{{PASSWORD}}' -b 'CN=Certificate Templates,CN=Public Key Services,CN=Services,CN=Configuration,{{BASEDN}}' '(objectClass=pKICertificateTemplate)' cn msPKI-Certificate-Name-Flag msPKI-Enrollment-Flag pKIExtendedKeyUsage
commands.description: Enumerate AD CS certificate templates and their enrollment settings.

commands.title: Find accounts with description field set
commands.description: Find users with non-empty description fields (often contain password hints).

tools.name: bloodhound-python
tools.description: Python-based BloodHound ingestor for remote AD data collection without needing a domain-joined host.

commands.title: Collect all data
commands.description: Run all collection methods (users, groups, sessions, ACLs, trusts, containers, GPOs).

commands.title: Collect all data (DCOnly — stealthier)
commands.description: Collect data only from the Domain Controller (no host enumeration, avoids detection).

commands.title: Collect group memberships only
commands.description: Collect only group membership data.

commands.title: Collect ACL data only
commands.description: Collect only ACL/permission data (DACLs on AD objects).

commands.title: Collect session data only
commands.description: Enumerate active sessions on reachable hosts.

commands.title: Collect with NTLM hash (PtH)
commands.description: Run BloodHound collection using pass-the-hash authentication.

commands.title: Collect with specific DC target
commands.description: Specify the DC explicitly (useful when DNS resolution fails).

commands.title: Collect with zip output
commands.description: Collect all data and output as a ZIP file ready for BloodHound import.

tools.name: windapsearch
tools.description: Python tool for quick LDAP enumeration of common AD objects.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain users
commands.description: List all domain users via LDAP.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain groups
commands.description: List all domain groups via LDAP.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain computers
commands.description: List all domain-joined computers.

commands.title: Enumerate Domain Admins
commands.description: List all members of the Domain Admins group.

commands.title: Enumerate privileged users
commands.description: Find all privileged users (Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins, Schema Admins, etc.).

commands.title: Enumerate unconstrained delegation
commands.description: Find user accounts trusted for unconstrained delegation.

commands.title: Enumerate unconstrained delegation computers
commands.description: Find computer accounts trusted for unconstrained delegation.

commands.title: Full enumeration (all modules)
commands.description: Run all enumeration modules and dump everything.

commands.title: Custom LDAP filter
commands.description: Execute a custom LDAP filter query.
